scripts.build:pom: bun build scripts/pom.tsx --outdir dist --target bun && cp dist/pom.js ~/bin/tools/pom && chmod +x ~/bin/tools/pom
scripts.build:lettuce-workspace: bun build scripts/lettuce-workspace.ts --outdir dist --target bun && cp dist/lettuce-workspace.js ~/bin/tools/lettuce-workspace && chmod +x ~/bin/tools/lettuce-workspace
scripts.build:lettuce-workspace-teardown: bun build scripts/lettuce-workspace-teardown.ts --outdir dist --target bun && cp dist/lettuce-workspace-teardown.js ~/bin/tools/lettuce-workspace-teardown && chmod +x ~/bin/tools/lettuce-workspace-teardown
scripts.build:lettuce-workspace-add: bun build scripts/lettuce-workspace-add.ts --outdir dist --target bun && cp dist/lettuce-workspace-add.js ~/bin/tools/lettuce-workspace-add && chmod +x ~/bin/tools/lettuce-workspace-add
scripts.build: mkdir -p ~/bin/tools && bun run build:pom && bun run build:lettuce-workspace && bun run build:lettuce-workspace-teardown && bun run build:lettuce-workspace-add
